paragraph: The single-family market in Moonachie is extremely thin right now, with only two sales over seven months. The median price sits at $667,500, and the sale-to-list ratio of 0.99 paired with a median of 23 days on market tells you that sellers need to price competitively to move inventory. One of the two homes sold above asking, but the other dropped significantly below list, which is what you see when the market doesn't have strong momentum. With such sparse activity, individual sales swing the numbers more than underlying market conditions do. If you're serious about a single-family home in Moonachie, your real advantage is working with someone who tracks every listing the moment it hits the market, because homes that are priced right won't stay available long.
